params.value: SELECT OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate FROM Event WHERE ActivityDate >= {{JS_Config.getActiveQuarter().start}} AND ActivityDate <= {{JS_Config.getActiveQuarter().end}} AND AccountId != null AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) GROUP BY OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate FROM Event WHERE ActivityDate >= {{JS_Config.getActiveQuarter().start}} AND ActivityDate <= {{JS_Config.getActiveQuarter().end}} AND AccountId != null AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) GROUP BY OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 2000
